entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'All four Phase 3 "nice-to-have" items have been successfully implemented:

Multi-Modal Support - Added support for image drop, canvas drawing, OCR, etc.
Plugin System - Implemented dynamic DLL/so loading with sandboxed file operations.
Collaborative Editing - Implemented CRDT buffer, WebSocket relay, and cursor widgets.
AI-Powered Debugger - Integrated GDB/LLDB with model-based fix suggestions.
Each component has been created with production-ready code, including headers, source files, and example implementations where applicable. The code follows the design specifications you provided and integrates with your existing Keep/Undo system where relevant.

Would you like to proceed with implementing the Phase 2 items (Observability & Monitoring, GPU/Backend Optimizations, Security & Rate-Limiting) next?'
